title: [release-1.33] Bump runc to v1.2.8 - CVE-2025-52881
body:
This addresses bumping crun to v1.2.8, which is a huge jump
for this repository, but it's the first version of runc
with the fix for https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cgrx-mc8f-2prm.

This also fixes CVE-2025-31133 and CVE-2025-52565

Fixes: https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-126916, https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-126923

Then bump to Buildah v1.33.13

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *TomSweeneyRedHat* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/release-1.33/OWNERS)~~ [TomSweeneyRedHat] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

@lsm5 Looks like we need to bump Go here, and I'm guessing in release-1.29 too, and probably others.  Thoughts on how to get that done?  Here's the error in the smoke test:

```
[+0003s] GO111MODULE=on go build -mod=vendor -ldflags '-X main.GitCommit=c7715c06c1e07fb8d20828f90a4a7b3e89a4a455 -X main.buildInfo=1763601821 -X main.cniVersion=v1.1.2 ' -gcflags "" -o bin/buildah -tags "seccomp  exclude_graphdriver_devicemapper    systemd" ./cmd/buildah
[+0003s] go: go.mod requires go >= 1.22 (running go 1.21.1; GOTOOLCHAIN=local)
[+0003s] make: *** [Makefile:73: bin/buildah] Error 1
```
The cirrus image used here needs updated golang. cc @timcoding1988
Just to circle-back, I've got this working slightly better over in https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6520
I'm closing this in favor of #6520
